title: Misato trusts in a different sort of bottle

wikitext:
[]: Misato trusts in a different sort of bottle             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Wed Jun 01, 2005 7:11 pm This story reminded me strongly of EVA, particularly the bit about the neurochemistry of parental bonding. As Ritsuko would tell Rei, "Time for your shot..." http://www.cnn.com/2005/HEALTH/06/01/tr ... index.html

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Jun 01, 2005 8:41 pm It would be interesting if Rei's medication was a form of trust control.
